response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with 15+ years of software experience, demonstrated staff-level seniority, and directly relevant recent work on MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the role explicitly requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and his AI/GenAI exposure is concentrated in the last year. Python — the dominant language in AI engineering — is absent from his skills list. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or enterprise-facing technical leadership in a consulting context, all of which are core to this role.
strengths: Hands-on MCP server and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq directly maps to a listed key technology
Demonstrated staff-level engineering across multiple companies with teaching, mentoring, and knowledge-sharing track record
Strong background in high-throughput data integration and microservices (Dunnhumby: millions of req/s), showing data pipeline competency
concerns: Python is absent from the resume entirely; it is the primary language for AI/ML engineering and a hard requirement
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM performance evaluation — all required qualifications
GenAI experience is limited to roughly one year (April 2025–present); the role requires 8+ years of AI solution delivery
